title: NAIS Domain Agent Discovery
description: JSON Schema for the NAIS domain-level agent discovery document. Published at /.well-known/nais-agents.json, this file declares all agents associated with a domain and links to external partner agents.

nais_version.description: The NAIS protocol version for this discovery document.

domain.description: The canonical domain that publishes this discovery document.

default_agent.description: The agent ID that should be used when no specific agent is requested. Must match an ID in the agents array.

agents.description: Local agents published by this domain.

linked_agents.description: External agents from other domains that this domain explicitly references or partners with.

organization.description: Organization or entity that operates this domain.

contact.description: Contact email or URL for the domain operator.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this document.

AgentEntry.description: A local agent published by this domain.

id.description: Unique agent identifier, typically a subdomain or scoped domain name.

scope.description: Agent scope. Always 'local' for agents in the agents array.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the agent.

description.description: Brief description of what this agent does.

manifest_url.description: HTTPS URL to the agent's full NAIS manifest (agent.json).

mcp_endpoint.description: Optional shortcut to the agent's MCP endpoint.

LinkedAgentEntry.description: An external agent from another domain that this domain references.

scope.description: Agent scope. Always 'external' for linked agents.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the external agent.

description.description: Brief description of the external agent's purpose in the context of this domain.

manifest_url.description: HTTPS URL to the external agent's NAIS manifest.

relationship.description: Nature of the relationship between this domain and the external agent.

verified.description: Whether the domain operator has verified the external agent's identity.

tags.description: Categorization tags for this linked agent.
